# switchboard-ai

> TypeScript SDK for connecting Electron apps, desktop apps, and local developer tools to AI runtimes through one API.

## Summary

switchboard-ai helps applications discover and connect to local AI tools such as Ollama, Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode.

Primary use cases:

- local LLM integration for Electron and desktop apps
- unified TypeScript API for multiple local AI providers
- agent-tool discovery on developer machines
- local HTTP bridge for AI tooling

## Primary Docs

- Repository: https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/switchboard-ai
- Overview and getting started: README.md
- API reference: docs/API-REFERENCE.md
- Examples: examples/README.md

## Key Terms

- local AI SDK
- TypeScript AI SDK
- Electron AI integration
- Ollama integration
- Codex integration
- Claude Code integration
- OpenCode integration
- local LLM discovery
- desktop app AI

## Public API

- `discover()`: list available providers and models
- `connect()`: connect to a specific provider or capability
- `callTool()`: invoke a provider through one entrypoint
- `createSwitchboardServer()` and `startSwitchboardServer()`: expose the API over HTTP
